title: Exact options contract web navigation plus API resolution planner
cliCommand: robinhood-cli api-map options-contract-plan --account <ACCOUNT_NUMBER> --symbol XBI --expiration 2026-06-26 --type call --side buy --strike 127 --json
liveResolutionCommand: robinhood-cli api-map options-contract-links --account <ACCOUNT_NUMBER> --symbol DRAM --expiration 2026-12-18 --type call --side buy --strike 80 --json
warnings: Only account_number on the web options-chain shell is browser-observed.
Expiration, strike, side, type, and position_effect URL query keys are candidates, not proven URL state.
Resolve exact option_instrument_id before building any order body.
Live options orders require exact user approval, --live-write, and ROBINHOOD_ALLOW_LIVE_WRITE=1.
